testcase.name: test_understand_with_products_returns_current_pillar

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'current_pillar' in response. Keys: dict_keys(['message', 'products', 'services', 'remembered_providers', 'tips', 'quick_replies', 'next_action', 'concierge_reason', 'concierge_framing', 'products_framing', 'alignment_question', 'safety_tips', 'has_real_products', 'has_services', 'ticket_id', 'suggest_concierge']) assert 'current_pillar' in {'alignment_question': 'Are you planning a full grooming session with bathing and nail care, or more of a quick tidy-up?', 'concierge_framing': None, 'concierge_reason': None, 'has_real_products': False, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mira_product_match_type.py:109: in test_understand_with_products_returns_current_pillar assert "current_pillar" in resp, f"Missing 'current_pillar' in response. Keys: {resp.keys()}" E AssertionError: Missing 'current_pillar' in response. Keys: dict_keys(['message', 'products', 'services', 'remembered_providers', 'tips', 'quick_replies', 'next_action', 'concierge_reason', 'concierge_framing', 'products_framing', 'alignment_question', 'safety_tips', 'has_real_products', 'has_services', 'ticket_id', 'suggest_concierge']) E assert 'current_pillar' in {'alignment_question': 'Are you planning a full grooming session with bathing and nail care, or more of a quick tidy-up?', 'concierge_framing': None, 'concierge_reason': None, 'has_real_products': False, ...}
